summary: Classified the hydrated PR remediation shard without proposing GitHub mutations. The five seed PRs are useful open fix candidates, but none has the complete merge preflight required for merge_candidate: no fresh passed Codex /review is present in the artifact, and several candidates also carry merge-risk labels or failing/unknown check state. No executable cluster-wide fix artifact is safe because the seed PRs cover unrelated fixes and the job allows at most one narrow build_fix_artifact.
